license_note: Code and data are licensed separately by the upstream repository. Curated admissions data reuse requires attribution to GradWindow and is limited to noncommercial use under CC BY-NC 4.0. Official university pages remain authoritative.
methodology: 只导入港新相关 QS Top 200 学校、计算机/AI/数据/信息技术相关项目和申请时间线线索。
这些记录用于项目发现、官网入口补全、上一申请季/申请季线索提示；不会自动覆盖 HarborPilot 的正式项目库字段。
deadline、tuition、language、materials、application_url 等关键字段仍必须回到学校官网、项目页、PDF/FAQ 或申请系统逐项确认。
coverage_note: GradWindow 当前主数据覆盖 QS Top 200。港新范围内已导入 HKU、CUHK、HKUST、CityUHK、PolyU、NUS、NTU 的相关线索；SMU 等不在 QS Top 200 主表内的学校仍以 HarborPilot 自有官方源注册表为准。

candidates.program_name: Master of Science in Computer Science - General Stream
candidates.program_name_zh: 计算机科学理学硕士（General Stream）
candidates.faculty: School of Computing and Data Science
candidates.evidence: GradWindow records HKU as programme-specific. The MSc Computer Science page publishes programme-level deadline/status information, but a complete open-close calendar window was not imported.
candidates.policy: 项目页为准，可能有多轮次；没有完整窗口时不能生成正式截止任务。
forbidden_use: 直接确认 2027 Fall 截止日期
直接确认学费、语言、材料要求

candidates.institution: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
candidates.faculty: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
candidates.evidence: CUHK Graduate School states that applications commenced on 1 September 2025 at 09:00 Hong Kong time and lists 31 January 2026 as the MSc in Computer Science deadline.
candidates.policy: 上一申请季官方窗口可作为准备节奏参考；2027 Fall 仍需重新打开 CUHK 官方页面确认。
allowed_use: 上一申请季时间线参考
forbidden_use: 把 2026 截止日复制为 2027 正式截止日

candidates.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
candidates.evidence: GradWindow records the official HKUST MSc IT programme page and apply-online entry, but no complete verified application window was present in applications.json.
candidates.policy: 用于补充项目页和投递入口；时间线必须回到 HKUST 项目页或申请系统确认。
forbidden_use: 直接生成正式截止日期

candidates.evidence: GradWindow notes that CityU taught postgraduate programmes use programme-level pages and deadlines, while the official page may present an Incapsula challenge to cloud-hosted requests.
candidates.policy: 保留项目页和申请入口；下一步需要浏览器或人工打开官网完成确认。
allowed_use: 需要人工打开官网的提醒
forbidden_use: 把无法抓取解释为学校没有开放

candidates.faculty: Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences
candidates.evidence: PolyU's official taught-postgraduate listing gives 2 July 2025 as the September 2026 application start and the MSc in Information Technology programme gives 30 April 2026 as its extended-round deadline.

next_cycle_estimate.use: 只作为内部准备节奏提示，不作为学校正式截止日期

candidates.policy: 上一申请季官方窗口和 README 估算可提示准备节奏；2027 Fall 正式时间必须回到 PolyU 官网确认。
allowed_use: 上一申请季时间线参考
forbidden_use: 把 Estimate 显示成学校正式日期

candidates.program_name_zh: NUS 研究生项目级申请入口
candidates.evidence: GradWindow records that NUS separates research and coursework routes and directs applicants to individual programme pages for programme-specific requirements and application details.
candidates.policy: 用于提醒 NUS 必须按具体项目页确认；不能用中央入口替代 NUS MComp 或 DSML 的具体轮次。
forbidden_use: 直接推断 NUS 具体项目截止日

candidates.program_name: Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence
candidates.program_name_zh: 应用人工智能计算硕士
candidates.faculty: College of Computing and Data Science
candidates.evidence: NTU's official coursework admissions page lists the Master of Computing in Applied Artificial Intelligence for the August 2026 intake and states that applications open on 1 November and close on 31 March.
candidates.policy: 上一申请季官方窗口可用于准备节奏；2027/28 学年必须重新打开 NTU coursework 页面确认。
allowed_use: 上一申请季时间线参考
forbidden_use: 把 2026 窗口直接复制为下一申请季正式日期
